case_title: AREVALO, ORLANDO ANTONIO VS KHAIT, VLADIMIR

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO VLADIMIR KHAIT RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AREVALO, ORLANDO ANTONIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KHAIT, VLADIMIR $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KHAIT, VLADIMIR
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY AREVALO, ORLANDO ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT KHAIT, VLADIMIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-23-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
